title: Duplicate _internet_checksum implementation across modules
description:
File: python/src/lichen/ipv6/udp.py:24-32 and python/src/lichen/ipv6/icmpv6.py:61-70

The _internet_checksum() function is duplicated identically in both udp.py and icmpv6.py:

```python
def _internet_checksum(data: bytes) -> int:
    if len(data) % 2:
        data += b'\x00'
    total = 0
    for i in range(0, len(data), 2):
        total += (data[i] << 8) | data[i + 1]
    while total >> 16:
        total = (total & 0xFFFF) + (total >> 16)
    return (~total) & 0xFFFF
```

This violates DRY (Don't Repeat Yourself) and creates a maintenance burden - any fix to the checksum algorithm would need to be applied in two places.

Fix: Extract to a shared utility module (e.g., lichen/ipv6/checksum.py or lichen/util.py) and import from both locations.

Tags: maintenance, code-quality, ipv6
